requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Series for PV Inverters — MBS Import Conformity, MERA, and Donor/Lender Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——MBS进口合格评定、MERA及捐助方/贷款方采购
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——MBS進口合格評定、MERA及捐助方/貸款方採購

summary.en: Malawi does not have a standalone national EMC Technical Regulation specific to solar PV inverters published and verified as of June 2026. EMC requirements for PV inverters in Malawi are addressed through: (a) MBS standards adoption — MBS adopts IEC standards and may include IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Harmonic current emission limits) within the conformity scope for regulated PV products; (b) MERA licensing conditions, which may impose IEC EMC evidence requirements for grid-tied inverters; (c) donor and lender procurement specifications (World Bank, MCC, AfDB) for utility-scale projects, which typically reference IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 series as part of equipment qualification. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment. IEC 61000-3-2 sets harmonic current emission limits for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase. Malawi's adoption of specific IEC EMC standards via MBS must be verified directly with MBS before shipment — the current MBS compulsory standards list and scope of PVoC coverage are the operative reference.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月，马拉维尚未发布经核实的、专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立国家EMC技术法规。马拉维光伏逆变器的EMC要求通过以下途径处理：（a）MBS标准采用——MBS采用IEC标准，可能在受监管光伏产品合格评定范围内纳入IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流排放限值）；（b）MERA许可证条件，可能对并网逆变器提出IEC EMC证据要求；（c）公用事业规模项目的捐助方和贷款方采购规格（世界银行、MCC、非洲开发银行），通常将IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列作为设备资格部分。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；IEC 61000-3-2规定了每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值。马拉维通过MBS对具体IEC EMC标准的采纳情况须在出货前直接向MBS核实——现行MBS强制性标准清单和PVoC覆盖范围是操作性参考依据。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月，馬拉威尚未發布經核實的、專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立國家EMC技術法規。馬拉威光伏逆變器的EMC要求通過以下途徑處理：（a）MBS標準採用——MBS採用IEC標準，可能在受監管光伏產品合格評定範圍內納入IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流排放限值）；（b）MERA許可證條件，可能對併網逆變器提出IEC EMC證據要求；（c）公用事業規模項目的捐助方和貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、MCC、非洲開發銀行），通常將IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列作為設備資格部分。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；IEC 61000-3-2規定了每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值。馬拉威通過MBS對具體IEC EMC標準的採納情況須在出貨前直接向MBS核實——現行MBS強制性標準清單和PVoC覆蓋範圍是操作性參考依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — national standards adoption of IEC standards for PV equipment
MERA — Malawi Energy Regulatory Authority licensing conditions (equipment EMC requirements)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic regulatory framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 and GB/T 37408 both draw on the IEC 61000 test method series, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope, referenced emission limits, and test conditions are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as would be applied by MBS, MERA, or donor/lender procurement evaluators in Malawi. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Malawi project submissions or MBS conformity.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内监管框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408均借鉴了IEC 61000测试方法系列，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围、引用排放限值和测试条件未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不被马拉维MBS、MERA或捐助方/贷款方采购评估机构作为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据接受。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为马拉维项目提交或MBS合格评定的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內監管框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408均借鑑了IEC 61000測試方法系列，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍、引用排放限值和測試條件未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不被馬拉威MBS、MERA或捐助方/貸款方採購評估機構作為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據接受。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為馬拉威項目提交或MBS合格評定的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as would be applied by MBS import conformity assessment, MERA licensing conditions, or donor/lender procurement for Malawi PV projects. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model and power rating; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Note that Malawi's grid voltage (230/400 V, 50 Hz) differs from China's grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) — where harmonic test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions, confirm with MBS or the relevant project engineer whether retesting under Malawi grid conditions is required. Additionally, verify with MBS whether IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 are currently within MBS's compulsory conformity scope for PV inverters, as the operative MBS compulsory standards list is the primary reference.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2要求（如MBS进口合格评定、MERA许可证条件或马拉维光伏项目捐助方/贷款方采购所适用的标准）。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号和功率等级的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。注意：马拉维电网电压（230/400 V、50 Hz）与中国电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）不同——若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件下取得，须向MBS或相关项目工程师确认是否需要在马拉维电网条件下重新测试。此外，须向MBS核实IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2是否目前属于MBS对光伏逆变器的强制性合格评定范围——现行MBS强制性标准清单是主要参考依据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2要求（如MBS進口合格評定、MERA許可證條件或馬拉威光伏項目捐助方/貸款方採購所適用的標準）。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號和功率等級的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。注意：馬拉威電網電壓（230/400 V、50 Hz）與中國電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）不同——若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件下取得，須向MBS或相關項目工程師確認是否需要在馬拉威電網條件下重新測試。此外，須向MBS核實IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2是否目前屬於MBS對光伏逆變器的強制性合格評定範圍——現行MBS強制性標準清單是主要參考依據。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence expected under donor/lender procurement conditions (World Bank, MCC, AfDB) for utility-scale Malawi PV projects; MBS compulsory scope for PV inverter EMC must be verified directly with MBS; MERA may impose IEC EMC evidence under licence conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is part of the voluntary CQC/CGC certification scheme; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as applied by MBS, MERA, or donor/lender procurement for Malawi. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission. Confirm whether Malawi's 230/400 V grid voltage conditions require retesting compared to results obtained under China's 220/380 V grid conditions. Verify directly with MBS whether IEC 62920 is currently within MBS compulsory import conformity scope for PV inverters before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足MBS、MERA或马拉维捐助方/贷款方采购适用的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向马拉维项目提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认马拉维230/400 V电网电压条件是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下取得的测试结果重新测试。出货前请直接向MBS核实IEC 62920是否目前属于MBS对光伏逆变器的强制性进口合格评定范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足MBS、MERA或馬拉威捐助方/貸款方採購適用的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向馬拉威項目提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認馬拉威230/400 V電網電壓條件是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下取得的測試結果重新測試。出貨前請直接向MBS核實IEC 62920是否目前屬於MBS對光伏逆變器的強制性進口合格評定範圍。
